appearance_and_shape.query: appearance, silhouette, visible form factor, shape, design, look
appearance_and_shape.snippet: Refresh your home’s air with the Levoit Core 300-P Air Purifier. The Pre-Filter removes large airborne particles like dust and hair, the Main Filter captures at least 99.97% of airborne particles down to 0.3 microns, and the Activated Carbon Filter removes smoke, odors, fumes and VOCs (Volatile Organic Compounds). This air purifier cleans the air in a room up to 1,073 ft² with noise levels as low as 22dB, helping you breathe cleaner air while maintaining a peaceful home.
